display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: No. 21 Arkansas visits LSU at the Pete Maravich Assembly Center. The Razorbacks won the Jan. 25 meeting 76-73 behind 31 points from freshman Darius Acuff Jr. The Tigers now rely on senior Max Mackinnon to defend home court in this SEC showdown.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: No. 21 Arkansas hosts Auburn at Bud Walton Arena. Razorback Darius Acuff Jr. headlines against Keyshawn Hall. D. Acuff Jr. shoots 49% from the field, while Hall leads the Tigers. Both teams battle for a top spot in the competitive SEC standings.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The No. 21 Arkansas Razorbacks travel to Tuscaloosa to face the Alabama Crimson Tide in a marquee SEC clash. Alabama's sophomore sensation Labaron Philon Jr. and Arkansas's Darius Acuff Jr. are both among the league's top scorers.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: Missouri travels to Fayetteville to take on No. 20 Arkansas. Arkansas sits near the top of the SEC standings, while Missouri competes for positioning in the middle of the rankings. Darius Acuff Jr. leads Arkansas in scoring and assists.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: No. 20 Arkansas (20-7) hosts Texas A&M (19-8) at Bud Walton Arena. The Aggies seek a third straight win after beating Oklahoma 75-71. John Calipari and the Razorbacks look to high scorer Darius Acuff Jr. to lead the home offense in the SEC matchup.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Longhorns travel to the Bud Walton Arena to challenge the No. 20 Razorbacks. Darius Acuff Jr. commands the floor for Arkansas, while Dailyn Swain navigates the paint for Texas. This clash promises fireworks at Bud Walton Arena.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Missouri Tigers host the No. 20 Arkansas Razorbacks for their final game of the regular season at Mizzou Arena. Arkansas enters as a top-20 team, while Missouri is coming off a strong week that saw Mark Mitchell named SEC Player of the Week.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Oklahoma Sooners face the Arkansas Razorbacks in the quarterfinals of the SEC Men's Basketball Tournament. Darius Acuff Jr. leads the Razorbacks with 22.2 points and 6.4 assists. Nijel Pack leads the Sooners with 16.5 points and 3.1 assists.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Vanderbilt Commodores and the Arkansas Razorbacks go head-to-head in the SEC Men's Basketball Tournament Championship final. Darius Acuff Jr. leads Arkansas with 22.7 PPG and 6.4 APG, while Tyler Tanner leads Vanderbilt with 19.2 PPG and 5.2 APG.

programme.title: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball
programme.desc: Adolph Rupp comes to the University of Kentucky in 1930, two years before the SEC is formed, and his Wildcats go on to dominate play in the conference for decades. Meanwhile, a future coaching legend later known as Pat Summitt is born in Tennessee.

programme.title: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball
programme.desc: Texas Western's historic win over Adolph Rupp's Kentucky team in the 1966 NCAA final marks a turning point in the SEC. Vanderbilt's Perry Wallace becomes the conference's first Black player, while at LSU, Pete Maravich rewrites the record books.

programme.title: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball
programme.desc: Dale Brown brings an infectious personality to LSU while Pat Summitt begins her legendary coaching career at Tennessee. And the year after Adolph Rupp's death in 1977, his successor Joe B. Hall leads Kentucky to its first NCAA title in 20 years.

programme.title: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball
programme.desc: Georgia's Dominique Wilkins and Auburn's Charles Barkley headline the SEC's successes in the early 1980s, while LSU's Dale Brown takes two teams to the Final Four. Pat Summitt wins her first two national titles at Tennessee.

programme.title: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball
programme.desc: Arkansas joins the SEC and becomes one of the conference's top teams, led by fiery coach Nolan Richardson and his "40 Minutes of Hell" attack. Kentucky returns to prominence, and at Tennessee, Pat Summitt wins three straight NCAA titles.

programme.title: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball
programme.desc: In his first year at Kentucky, Tubby Smith becomes the third Black coach ever to win a national title. Florida's back-to-back NCAA crowns mark the rise of a new power. The Lady Vols win 2 straight NCAA titles as LSU reaches 5 straight Final Fours.

programme.title: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball
programme.desc: John Calipari continues the winning tradition at Kentucky with a national championship in 2012. Four years later, Pat Summitt passes away after battling early-onset Alzheimer's disease. Dawn Staley leads South Carolina to a pair of NCAA titles.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Burger Burger in Biloxi, Miss.; for po-boy loaves, layered with double patties and onion sauce; Troy's Snack Shack in Montezuma, Ga., for sloppy chili-slaw burgers; Hamburger King near downtown Montgomery, Ala.

programme.title: Placeholder
programme.desc: Top college athletes compete for school pride and championship glory.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: A limited series on Southern food and culture. John T. Edge writes and hosts the show and is executive produced by Wright Thompson; Season Five revolves around two food stories told from one place and sets in the conversation to make larger points about Southern beliefs and identities.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Across generations, people have flocked to this Atlantic Coast city to follow their dreams; farmworkers from south Georgia arrived here in search of jobs as longshoremen; immigrants from Lebanon came in search of religious and economic freedom.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: The subject of endless magazine listicles and breathless influencer reels; is it possible to sidestep the algorithms and really see and hear and taste Charleston?

programme.title: Live: 2026 Men's College World Series
programme.desc: From Charles Schwab Field Omaha in Omaha, Neb.

programme.title: Live US Open Golf Round 2
programme.desc: The second round of the 126th US Open Championship at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club. JJ Spaun snatched Major glory last year with a two-shot win over Scotland's Robert MacIntyre. (19.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: Live Major League Cricket
programme.desc: The Seattle Orcas take on Washington Freedom in a 20-over contest from Major League Cricket at the Grand Prairie Stadium in Dallas, Texas.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: World Cup Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of the all the breaking news stories from the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with live analysis and comment plus interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live R&A Men's Amateur C'ship
programme.desc: On the final day of the 131st Amateur Championship, the 36-hole final gets underway at Royal Liverpool. Ethan Fang of the United States clinched victory in last year's finale.

programme.title: Live 2nd Test Day 4: ENG v NZ
programme.desc: The fourth day of the second Test at the Oval in a three-match series between England and New Zealand.

programme.title: Live ICC Women's T20 WC: ENG v SCO
programme.desc: England and Scotland collide at the ICC Women's T20 World Cup.

programme.title: Live US Open Golf Round 3
programme.desc: The third round of the 126th US Open Championship at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club. JJ Spaun snatched Major glory last year with a two-shot win over Scotland's Robert MacIntyre.

programme.title: Live: The Pat McAfee Show
programme.desc: Former NFL punter Pat McAfee brings his humor and candor to the microphone to highlight the day's top stories.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Today
programme.desc: In-depth, comprehensive daily coverage of all aspects of the NBA from expert analysts.

programme.title: NFL Live
programme.desc: Host Laura Rutledge takes the helm of this weekday show featuring the likes of Marcus Spears, Dan Orlovsky, Mina Kimes, and Adam Schefter. The "NFL Live" crew entertains fans while offering all the latest news and analysis from across the NFL.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: From Great American Ball Park in Cincinnati.

programme.title: ESPN Films
programme.desc: The most amazing, moving and exciting stories in the world of sports.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter With Scott Van Pelt
programme.desc: SVP's up at midnight and bringing his unique perspective on games people play to "SportsCenter" viewers. The hourlong, late-night show is driven by the host's self-deprecating wit and passion for sports, with featured elements, including Van Pelt's nightly "1 Big Thing" commentary and a weekly look back at the moments that drove bettors wild in "Bad Beats." The show also delivers what "SportsCente

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. programme.title: Live: Athletes Unlimited Softball League
programme.desc: From Parkway Bank Sports Complex in Rosemont, Ill.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: Rafael Palmeiro and Will Clark, teammates for the 1985 Mississippi State Bulldogs, nearly propelled the team to a College World Series title.

programme.title: Live: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: From Great American Ball Park in Cincinnati.

programme.title: Return of the Clowns
programme.desc: This documentary chronicles the extraordinary journey of the Indianapolis Clowns, once icons of Negro League baseball, now reborn for a new generation through the electric world of Banana Ball.

programme.title: Banana Ball Live
programme.desc: Highlights from the Savannah Bananas baseball team.

programme.title: NCAA Men's College World Series Studio
programme.desc: College baseball experts help viewers stay informed about NCAA Men's College World Series action.

programme.desc: From Charles Schwab Field Omaha in Omaha, Neb.

programme.title: Roland Garros
programme.desc: A look back at the 2026 tournament.

programme.title: Tom Daley: 1.6 Seconds
programme.desc: Tom Daley's journey from Olympic prodigy to national treasure, through athletic triumphs, losing his dad, coming out, and intense public pressure.

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the seventh round of the season at Misano World Circuit in Emilia-Romagna, Italy.

programme.title: FIA World Endurance Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the 24 Hours of Le Mans, which served as the third round of the season at Circuit de la Sarthe in Le Mans, France.

programme.desc: The Sanya ePrix second practice session. Coverage of preparations for the 11th round of the season at Sanya Street Circuit in China.

programme.desc: A special look at the World Endurance Championship, a global series of races that test the limits of both drivers and vehicles.

programme.desc: Coverage of stage four of the Tour of Switzerland, as the riders tackle a 23.8km individual time-trial around the historic town of Aarburg.

programme.desc: Coverage of stage four of the Tour of Slovenia, which sees the peloton take on tough climbs on the 184.7km route from Kranj to Kranjska Gora.

programme.desc: Coverage of stage four of the Tour of Switzerland, a 23.8km individual time-trial around the historic town of Aarburg.

programme.title: Live: Blue Jays Central
programme.desc: Toronto Blue Jays pregame show hosted by Jamie Campbell.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Blue Jays travel to Wrigley Field to battle the Cubs in Game 1 of a three-game series. Kevin Gausman and Ben Brown are the expected starting pitchers. The teams met last season, when the Blue Jays secured a narrow 2-1 win to close the series.

programme.title: Live: Blair & Barker
programme.desc: Jeff Blair and Kevin Barker talk all things Blue Jays, and Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Live: The FAN Pregame
programme.desc: Ailish Forfar and Justin Cuthbert discuss the stories that matter most to sports fans.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Yankees host the Cincinnati Reds at Yankee Stadium for Game 1 of a three-game series. Rhett Lowder and Cam Schlittler are the expected starting pitchers. In their last game, New York salvaged the final match with a dominant 7-1 victory.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Orioles travel to Los Angeles to begin a three-game series against the Dodgers. Trey Gibson and Roki Sasaki are the expected starting pitchers. Baltimore won the prior series 2-1, but Los Angeles prevented a sweep by winning the final game 5-2.

programme.title: Live: Sportsnet Central
programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: Sportsnet Central
programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: Blue Jays in 30
programme.desc: From June 19, 2026.

programme.title: Live: Blue Jays Central
programme.desc: Toronto Blue Jays pregame show hosted by Jamie Campbell.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Toronto Blue Jays face the Chicago Cubs in Game 2 of a three-game series at Wrigley Field in Chicago. Left-handed pitcher Patrick Corbin is the projected starter for the Blue Jays against the Cubs right-handed pitcher Colin Rea.

programme.title: MLB Live Coverage
programme.desc: Coverage of Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Guardians face the Astros in Game 2 at Daikin Park. Joey Cantillo and Mike Burrows are the expected starting pitchers. Young bats Chase DeLauter and Kyle Manzardo lead Cleveland's offense, while elite slugger Yordan Álvarez anchors Houston.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Philadelphia Phillies host the New York Mets to open a regular-season division series. Philadelphia looks to starting pitcher Aaron Nola to anchor the home lineup, while New York relies on starting pitcher Sean Manaea to direct the defense.

programme.title: Mets Classics
programme.desc: After being down to their last strike, the Mets rally back. From July 5, 2023.

programme.desc: Highlights of the 2018 New York Mets season.

programme.title: Game 161
programme.desc: A Mets Special on the 2024 game against the Braves that clinched the Mets a playoff spot. After schedule switches, injuries, and a competitive series, the Mets have the chance to defy the odds and get their playoff spot.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Chicago Cubs v Toronto Blue Jays (Start-time 7.20pm). Coverage of the inter-league match at Wrigley Field. These two sides last met in August last year in a three-match series in Toronto. The Blue Jays won the contest 2-1 thanks to 5-1 and 2-1 victories in between a 4-1 for the Cubs.

programme.desc: A look at the most exciting plays from the past week's matches.

programme.desc: Action from the Group 1 matches in the Champions League tournament, as four players competed in a series of round-robin matches to earn a place in the Super 8's.

programme.desc: Houston Astros v Cleveland Guardians (Start-time 12.15am). Coverage of the American League match at Daikin Park.

programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.desc: Learn about Michael McKenry, who was the energetic spark that was a big part of the Pirates renaissance; whether he was on the field, out in the community or in the studio, he has shown his leadership and love to the city of Pittsburgh.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.desc: Jared Sullinger; top five prospects from Southeast; Doron Lamb; Kendall Marshall; national play of the week; Tony Wroten, Jr.; top ten.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.desc: Tatiana Cruz shares how the Tampa Bay Kayak Anglers organization positively impacts the community and explains why she and her husband are deeply committed to supporting its mission and growth.

programme.desc: The final four teams compete for the Summit Cup Championship Trophy. From Shreveport-Bossier City, La.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Jared Sullinger; top five prospects from Southeast; Doron Lamb; Kendall Marshall; national play of the week; Tony Wroten, Jr.; top ten.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Altitude Extra
programme.desc: Vic Lombardi sits down with Coach Prime to discuss his recent diagnosis with bladder cancer, how his other health struggles led to that diagnosis and how his faith helps him manage his day-to-day responsibilities.

programme.title: Altitude Extra
programme.desc: Vic Lombardi sat down with Denver Nuggets legend Dan Issel to discuss his basketball career, his involvement with horse racing and his evaluation of Nikola Jokić.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: FanDuel Racing
programme.desc: Live horse racing from around the country.

programme.title: Major League Fishing
programme.desc: The final four teams compete for the Summit Cup Championship Trophy. From Shreveport-Bossier City, La.

programme.title: Live: Longines League of Nations
programme.desc: Coverage of the qualifier event in Kralingse Bos, Rotterdam, as top-level equestrian stars battle for a spot in the Barcelona finals.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Goals Reload
programme.desc: A look back at the best goals from the quarter-finals, semi-finals and final.

programme.title: Miracle of Istanbul
programme.desc: A look back at Liverpool's famous comeback in the 2005 Champions League final.

programme.title: UFC: The Ultimate Fighter
programme.desc: Documentary series that follows MMA fighters.

programme.title: UFC
programme.desc: Action from UFC Freedom 250 held on the South Lawn of the White House, which was headlined by the Light-Heavyweight title fight between Ilia Topuria and Justin Gaethje.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at matchday 36 of the top flight, including Liverpool v Chelsea, West Ham United v Arsenal, Tottenham Hotspur v Leeds United, and Manchester City v Brentford.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at matchday 37 of the top flight, featuring Chelsea v Tottenham Hotspur, Arsenal v Burnley, Aston Villa v Liverpool, and Bournemouth v Manchester City.

programme.title: Premier League Stories
programme.desc: A profile of former West Ham United star Julian Dicks as he reflects on a career that made him one of the Premier League’s toughest and most uncompromising defenders.

programme.title: UEFA Conference League Goals Reload
programme.desc: A look back at the best goals from the quarter-finals, semi-finals and final.

programme.title: Live: One Day International Cricket
programme.desc: India v Afghanistan. Coverage of the third ODI in the three-match series, which takes place at M. A. Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai. The visitors haven't beat India in any of the four completed ODI's between the two sides, with the hosts winning three and the other ending in a thrilling tie in 2018. In that match, Afghanistan made 252-8 with Mohammad Shahzad hitting 124, before they bowled India o

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Crew is having James Bradley down to celebrate his 50th birthday, and somebody lands a fish of a lifetime.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: Salt Water Sportsman National Seminar Series
programme.desc: George Poveromo and panel discuss successful wahoo tactics.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob is alone and on a mission. His target? Sight fishing Shallow water sharks on fly.

programme.title: Modern Fishing With Jared Jeffries
programme.desc: Like many anglers, Jared was introduced to fishing as a young boy by his father; Jared wants to return the lifelong favor and get his dad on some Venice Bull Reds in Louisiana, joined by Capt. James Peters.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: The Guyz find some backcountry action along the shoreline of the Cape of Florida with Capt. Brian Gwilliam; George and Lain visit Crane Point Hammock in Marathon; chef Cat prepares an Italian fish recipe submitted by fan Chuckie D.

programme.title: Big Coast
programme.desc: Salmon Conservation is the name of the game on Wannock River where the crew works with some of the largest salmon on Earth.

programme.title: BigWater Adventures
programme.desc: Bringing home the groceries with the Venice, LA big 5. Slot Redfish, Flounder, Speckled Trout, Black Drum, and Sheepshead.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Crew is having James Bradley down to celebrate his 50th birthday, and somebody lands a fish of a lifetime.

programme.title: Lisa Roper Outdoors
programme.desc: Welcome to Lisa Roper Outdoors, where every episode is a journey into the heart of outdoor adventure; from breathtaking landscapes to mouthwatering shore lunches, Lisa Roper brings you along as she connects with nature in a way that stirs the soul.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Mark Melnyk and Tom Rosenbauer are in Southern Chile fishing New Waters to them and the guides.

programme.title: Connect Fishing Experiences
programme.desc: It is summer, so Josh puts the downriggers away and spends a day jigging the shallow waters around the lighthouse at Blubber Bay.

programme.title: Extreme Angler TV
programme.desc: Fishing for early season walleye on Lake Nipissing with jig and minnow and finding schools of twenty-inch plus walleyes.

programme.title: The Fish'n Canada Show
programme.desc: Angling adventures from Newfoundland to British Columbia.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Celebrating British Columbia's and Mexico's hottest outfitters and saltwater sportfishing destinations each week.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Host Mike Mitchell and guests fish throughout British Columbia.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild West
programme.desc: Early fall cold front walleye and northern pike with G&S Marina Outfitters in southern Saskatchewan.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild West
programme.desc: Early fall cold front walleye and northern pike with G&S Marina Outfitters in southern Saskatchewan.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: In-Fisherman tactics are finally always a mix of extensive time on the water along with the best science available, so we're tackling big-water smallmouths during a tough mid-summer time on the water.

programme.title: The Next Bite
programme.desc: Chase Parsons and Tom Huynh throw live bait and artificials in the Detroit Lakes Minnesota area.

programme.title: Legends of Rod & Reel
programme.desc: Ted Takasaki puts himself in the record books with a one-day professional walleye record.

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.desc: While Larry guides at home, the crew hits the Munising Trout and Salmon Classic to support local firefighters!

programme.title: Jokers Wild off the Hook
programme.desc: Sparky goes fishing in Florid in the Gulf of America chasing Reds and more.

programme.title: Angling Edge
programme.desc: Al Lindner details why DT crankbaits shine in northern waters, dialing precise depths to trigger big bass.

programme.title: Jon Thelen's Destination Fish
programme.desc: Jon tackles spring's toughest challenge: catching walleyes under bright skies and high pressure. He details how small tweaks in cadence, line, and lure color can turn the tide. Then, as autumn settles in, Jon enjoys calm fall conditions - proving that even glassy water can produce limits when you slow down and fish smart.

programme.title: Bass Pro Shops Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: Fishing tips and tricks and competitive angling action.

programme.title: Fishing University
programme.desc: Hooks are the topic of today's show with ARK fishing Founder Louie Zhang.

programme.title: Ultimate Catch
programme.desc: Captain Eric and his guest Ted Norbits fish Headwaters Lake in Central Florida for some exciting winter bass fishing!

programme.title: Texas Team Trail
programme.desc: Lake Texoma shows off for the Texas Team Trail! Find out which anglers rise to the occasion and figure out how to adjust in order to take home this Texas-sized trophy and earn more points towards the Team of the Year presented by Progressive race!

programme.title: Power-Pole National Redfish Tour
programme.desc: The 2025 Power-Pole National Redfish Tour held at Jim King Park in Jacksonville, Fla.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is in Missouri fishing a gravel pit.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland looks for warmer water temperatures near 70 degrees, and casts swim jigs, topwater, and worms for 2-6 pound bass.

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.desc: The fun never ends with Bill & his good friend Roy Harkness & George Young as they fish for blues on the Mississippi down in Vicksburg.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Peter Deeks guides Bill into the tributaries of the Indian River Lagoon in search of tarpon!

programme.desc: The Blue Jays travel to Wrigley Field to battle the Cubs in Game 1 of a three-game series. Kevin Gausman and Ben Brown are the expected starting pitchers. The teams met last season, when the Blue Jays secured a narrow 2-1 win to close the series.

programme.desc: From Las Vegas to London, and everywhere in-between such as Russia, Bahamas, China, and Australia - the Super High Roller Bowl is one of the biggest events of the year. The Super High Roller Bowl has awarded over $125 million in prize money.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Toronto Blue Jays face the Chicago Cubs in Game 2 of a three-game series at Wrigley Field in Chicago. Left-handed pitcher Patrick Corbin is the projected starter for the Blue Jays against the Cubs right-handed pitcher Colin Rea.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Shark hunting. Blood in the water can only mean one thing, the sharks are circling.

programme.title: Made for the Outdoors
programme.desc: Each week on Made for the Outdoors, hosts Bill Sherck and Alexa Score throw open the factory doors and show how your favorite outdoor gear gets made.

programme.title: Guns & Gear TV
programme.desc: Ruger and Gun Talk launch a special Scout Rifle. Black Hills Ammo, Winchester Supreme Optics, Ross Martin, and Wheeler Tools launch new gear.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion angler Chris Lane hunts these wild waters in search of giant bass, but can he find them?

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Peter Deeks guides Bill into the tributaries of the Indian River Lagoon in search of tarpon!

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: Taking viewers on hunts across the whitetail's range while providing land management tips and representing buyers and sellers of hunting, farm, ranch, timber, country homes and auctions across the country.

programme.title: Bowhunter TV
programme.desc: Bowhunter Host Curt Wells talks about gearing up and hunting for truly big game.

programme.title: Bloodline Hunting
programme.desc: Travel with Matt Bullins as he journeys through grassroots America, seeking out new adventures and uncovering the rich bloodlines that define our hunting culture. Along the way, he highlights the people, histories, and experiences that keep these timeless traditions thriving.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: The hunt for Coues deer continues, and the ranch chef prepares chili Colorado tamales with venison.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Danny hunt Dall sheep in Alaska.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Shark hunting. Blood in the water can only mean one thing, the sharks are circling.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: The whole crew is back in Texas hunting whitetails in the October heat.

programme.title: Tecomate Whitetail Nation
programme.desc: Mark and David enjoy farewell hunts on Georgia's Tecomate Signature Property, Fox Creek Plantation, before passing stewardship on to the new owner.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: Sean Lundy and son, Cole, share the stories of their 2023 and 2024 deer seasons.

programme.title: Haymaker Hunting
programme.desc: In Texas, King hunts ducks and hogs with Sandy Brady, sponsored by Migra Ammunition, and Tornado Valley Outfitters also reconnects with family roots.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy the Fishmonger is back, and he's taking a road trip up the coast of the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: The whole crew is back in Texas hunting whitetails in the October heat.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: The hunt for Coues deer continues, and the ranch chef prepares chili Colorado tamales with venison.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Danny hunt Dall sheep in Alaska.

programme.title: Tecomate Whitetail Nation
programme.desc: Mark and David enjoy farewell hunts on Georgia's Tecomate Signature Property, Fox Creek Plantation, before passing stewardship on to the new owner.

programme.title: Haymaker Hunting
programme.desc: In Texas, King hunts ducks and hogs with Sandy Brady, sponsored by Migra Ammunition, and Tornado Valley Outfitters also reconnects with family roots.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andy Buchanan and his team embark on adrenaline-fueled hunting adventures across Africa, showcasing the continent's most sought-after trophies while delving into the crucial role of hunters in wildlife conservation. Amidst epic hunts and breathtaking scenery, they address misconceptions about hunting and highlight the collaborative efforts of local communities, governments, and hunters to protect

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger talks about some of his most memorable whitetail hunts from his trophy room.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Experience the ultimate connection between man and nature with Winchester and Drury Outdoors Natural Born! Whether you love fired-up gobblers, monster whitetails, or Western adventure, Natural Born immerses you in the beauty of nature and the raw authenticity of the hunt. We were born for this!

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Co-Host Colin Mulligan joins host and biologist Kelly Warren who wrote the book, on the knowledge and understand of the subspecies of Canada geese that frequent Washington and Oregon.

programme.title: Adrenaline
programme.desc: A Colorado Elk hunt from a fresh perspective as Kyle Wieter helps guide his close friend and first time hunter Brad Pfitzner to success.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action-packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straightforward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching platf

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Christian and Patrick join Capt Don aboard Drift Charters in St Thomas catching Kings, and crushing the bottom fish.

programme.title: Angling Edge
programme.desc: Al Lindner details why DT crankbaits shine in northern waters, dialing precise depths to trigger big bass.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is in Missouri fishing a gravel pit.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Co-Host Colin Mulligan joins host and biologist Kelly Warren who wrote the book, on the knowledge and understand of the subspecies of Canada geese that frequent Washington and Oregon.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: The whole crew is back in Texas hunting whitetails in the October heat.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Hunting is not a privilege, it is our God given right. Hunt always was, and continues to be integrally woven into the fabric of society. It is our goal to celebrate our God given right to hunt in each episode, and portray the passion we all have for this way of life. Follow Kenneth Lancaster, Mark Heck and Laden Force as they travel the country, exercising their God given right to hunt.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: For over 20 years Michael Lee and Kevin Knighton have been blessed to bring the Backwoods Life hunting show and outdoor television into the homes of loyal viewers each week. The guys work hard to bring their lives, personalities, and experiences to the show while demonstrating what the average person goes through each year trying to fill tags and their freezers.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Co-Host Colin Mulligan joins host and biologist Kelly Warren who wrote the book, on the knowledge and understand of the subspecies of Canada geese that frequent Washington and Oregon.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: In the cold of Torrington, Wyo., the crew teams up with High Plains Wingshooters for late-flying geese and all-day pit blind grinds; it's a battle of patience, but the rewards come heavy culminating in fresh pushes of new birds.

programme.title: Angling Edge
programme.desc: Al Lindner details why DT crankbaits shine in northern waters, dialing precise depths to trigger big bass.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Big Water Angler takes viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques, and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Outdoor sporting and recreational events for everyone.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Peter Deeks guides Bill into the tributaries of the Indian River Lagoon in search of tarpon!

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Crew is having James Bradley down to celebrate his 50th birthday, and somebody lands a fish of a lifetime.

programme.title: Fly Fisherman Presents the Shoals
programme.desc: Join the Fly Fisherman crew on a wild exploration chasing sharks and giant trevally on foot in the beautiful paradise of St. Brandon Atoll.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures: Fishing with Wesley
programme.desc: Wesley White travels to Brazil to fish for peacock bass on the Rio Negro River.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is in Missouri fishing a gravel pit.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy the Fishmonger is back, and he's taking a road trip up the coast of the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Experience the ultimate connection between man and nature with Winchester and Drury Outdoors Natural Born! Whether you love fired-up gobblers, monster whitetails, or Western adventure, Natural Born immerses you in the beauty of nature and the raw authenticity of the hunt. We were born for this!

programme.title: Bloodline Hunting
programme.desc: Travel with Matt Bullins as he journeys through grassroots America, seeking out new adventures and uncovering the rich bloodlines that define our hunting culture. Along the way, he highlights the people, histories, and experiences that keep these timeless traditions thriving.

programme.title: Toshito
programme.desc: A father and son embark on a fishing expedition in Costa Rica, where they navigate the complexities of their relationship while chasing Tosh's dream of catching a marlin on a handline.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: Sean Lundy and son, Cole, share the stories of their 2023 and 2024 deer seasons.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Hunting the Gobi ibex and white-tailed gazelle in Mongolia.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andy Buchanan and his team embark on adrenaline-fueled hunting adventures across Africa, showcasing the continent's most sought-after trophies while delving into the crucial role of hunters in wildlife conservation. Amidst epic hunts and breathtaking scenery, they address misconceptions about hunting and highlight the collaborative efforts of local communities, governments, and hunters to protect
